reason_for_decision: The article passes because it ties focal length to task, sensor size, field of view, and mounting reality instead of treating lens choice as a simple zoom preference.
strengths: The article is strong at turning an optics topic into a practical surveillance-design workflow instead of a camera-buying checklist.
It explains why focal length cannot be interpreted without sensor size and task level, which gives the piece solid technical credibility.
The sections on stability, cueing, and atmosphere keep the lens discussion grounded in real deployment behavior.
summary_assessment: This is a strong technical explainer with good decision value. It should help buyers and planners avoid several common long-range lens-selection mistakes.
